name: Dimo no Tsuma
description: ~!The wife and daughter of Dimo Reeves are seen mourning his death. When Erwin Smith approaches the body of Reeves, they tell him to stay away, believing it was the Survey Corps who are responsible for his death. Erwin responds by acknowledging Reeves' dedication to the people of Trost, and vowing to avenge Reeves' death!~
